hero_sub: The visual, interactive platform that lets anyone design, train, and understand neural networks. No coding or advanced math required.
features_section_sub: We removed the programming barriers so students can focus purely on architectural and conceptual understanding.
feature_1_title: See the math, don't write it.
feature_1_desc: Connect layers like building blocks. Understand the flow of data instantly. The 'glass box' approach ensures students actually comprehend what happens under the hood.
feature_2_desc: Meet Axon, the built-in AI tutor. Axon helps students understand what each layer does, answers questions in real-time, and guides them when they're stuck.
feature_3_desc: Validate models instantly. Watch your trained neural networks drive an autonomous car or navigate a maze right in the browser. See decisions manifest in observable behavior.
teacher_sub_suffix: with your students. Neuralese provides educators with the tools needed to manage, pace, and deliver impactful AI lessons without requiring specialized hardware.
card_01_desc: Keep the whole class on the same step while students build.
card_02_desc: Validate work live and nudge students through each concept.
card_03_desc: Track progress, spot blockers, and keep the room moving.
card_04_desc: Browser-first lessons that do not need expensive hardware.
